High importance on CAN ID, timing gaps, or payload deltas means these fields must be preserved at frame/short-window granularity. Any feature that directly encodes attack labels would be leakage; this script uses only timestamp, arbitration_id, data_field-derived bytes/DLC, and derived temporal deltas.
